Originally from Lindenbee Rest, Mariya Tanase now calls Fireside Pines her home. She graduated from the Timberclad Institute, where she honed her skills in her professional language, Bengali script. Currently, she works at Zenith Sable Advisors, applying the knowledge gained during her studies.
